name: Strawberry Tapioca Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1/2 basket fresh strawberries (12 oz or approximately 0.35 kg)
1/4 cup Sucanat (or cane sugar, syrup, or flavored sweetener like cinnamon sugar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the strawberries.
2. Bring water and chopped strawberries to a rolling boil in a saucepan over high heat.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (tapioca pearls, Sucanat, and vanilla) to the boiling mixture. Reduce the heat to low.
4. Stir constantly or frequently until most of the tapioca pearls have turned completely translucent.
5. Turn off the heat and let the pudding cool for a while.
Tastes great warm or cold and is very filling!
